extDescription.message: أرسل الصفحات وملفات تعريف الارتباط من هذا المتصفح إلى تطبيق Capsule المحلي للتوثيق الجنائي.

permissionRequiredTitle.description: Title shown when the popup needs the user to grant host permission for a site.

permissionRequiredBody.message: ‏Capsule بحاجة إلى الوصول إلى $HOST$ لقراءة ملفات تعريف الارتباط الخاصة به. انقر على الزر مرة أخرى ثم اختر «سماح».
permissionRequiredBody.description: Body explaining why the host permission is needed.

permissionDeniedTitle.description: Title shown after the user dismisses the host-permission prompt.

unsupportedSchemeBody.message: يمكن قراءة ملفات تعريف الارتباط فقط على صفحات http:// أو https://.
unsupportedSchemeBody.description: Body shown when the active tab is on a chrome://, about:, or other unsupported scheme.

noCookiesFoundTitle.message: لم يتم العثور على ملفات تعريف ارتباط
noCookiesFoundTitle.description: Title for the result screen when permission was granted but the page had no cookies.

noCookiesFoundBody.message: تأكد من تسجيل الدخول في هذا التبويب ثم حاول مرة أخرى.

captureModeLabel.description: Label for the capture mode segmented control (Arabic).

captureModeWebpage.description: Capture mode pill: page snapshot only (Arabic).

captureModeMedia.description: Capture mode pill: force media download path (Arabic).

captureModeGallery.description: Capture mode pill: force gallery-dl image capture path (Arabic).

popupTitle.description: Browser-tab title for the popup. Brand name; usually left as-is.

popupUnpairedMessage.message: ‏لم يتم إقران هذه الإضافة بتثبيت Capsule بعد.
popupUnpairedMessage.description: Shown when the popup opens but no pairing token is stored locally.

popupPairButton.description: Button on the unpaired screen that opens the pairing page.

popupActiveCaseLabel.description: Label above the case picker dropdown.

popupSendTabAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the primary Send-this-tab button.

popupSendTabButton.description: Primary button: submit the current tab as a capture job.

popupSendListToggleButton.description: Button: reveals the multi-URL textarea form.

popupSyncCookiesButton.message: مزامنة ملفات تعريف الارتباط لهذا الموقع
popupSyncCookiesButton.description: Button: uploads cookies for the active tab's domain to the active case.

popupUrlListPlaceholder.message: رابط واحد في كل سطر · الحد الأقصى 25
popupUrlListPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the multi-URL textarea.

popupSendListButton.description: Submit button for the multi-URL textarea.

popupCaptureOptionsHeading.description: Summary text for the collapsible Capture-options block.

popupLiveCaptureLabel.description: Toggle label: ship MHTML/screenshot/DOM/storage from the user's browser.

popupLiveCaptureHint.message: ‏— يُرسل MHTML ولقطة الشاشة ولقطة DOM وحالة التخزين جنبًا إلى جنب مع الالتقاط الأساسي.
popupLiveCaptureHint.description: Hint shown under the Include-live-capture toggle. Leading em-dash is intentional.

popupBlockAdsLabel.message: حجب الإعلانات والمتتبّعين في هذا المتصفح
popupBlockAdsLabel.description: Toggle label: enable declarativeNetRequest blocking in the user's tab.

popupBlockAdsHint.message: — يطابق قائمة الحجب في الخادم حتى لا يحمل الالتقاط المباشر ضوضاء المتتبّعين.
popupBlockAdsHint.description: Hint shown under the block-ads toggle.

popupRealHarLabel.description: Toggle label: attach the Chrome debugger to record a full HAR.

popupRealHarHint.message: ‏— يعرض Chrome شريطًا أصفر أثناء الاتصال. معطّل افتراضيًا.
popupRealHarHint.description: Hint shown under the chrome.debugger toggle, warning about the visible banner.

popupEphemeralCookiesLabel.description: Toggle label: send cookies for this capture only, never persist to the case.

popupEphemeralCookiesHint.message: — ترسل ملفات تعريف الارتباط لهذا الالتقاط فقط. لا تُكتب أبدًا إلى مجلد القضية.
popupEphemeralCookiesHint.description: Hint shown under the ephemeral-cookies toggle.

popupRotateTokenButton.description: Link button in the popup footer that mints a new token.

popupManageButton.description: Link button in the popup footer that opens the pairing page.

popupPairedAsLabel.description: Chip in the popup footer showing the human-readable label of the active pairing.

popupDoneButton.description: Button that returns from the result screen to the paired screen.

statusChecking.description: Status pill while the popup is verifying the pairing.

statusNotPaired.description: Status pill when no pairing token is stored locally.

statusServerChanged.description: Status pill when the Capsule server's signing key fingerprint no longer matches the paired one.

statusOffline.description: Status pill when the Capsule server can't be reached.

statusConnected.description: Status pill when the popup has reached the paired Capsule server.

errorScreenTitle.description: Heading on the popup's error screen.

errorRetryButton.description: Button on the error screen that re-runs the popup init.

errorBackButton.description: Link on the error screen that returns to the paired screen.

errorServerFingerprintMismatch.message: ‏تغيّر مفتاح توقيع خادم Capsule. أعد إقران الإضافة.
errorServerFingerprintMismatch.description: Error body when the server's Ed25519 fingerprint doesn't match the paired one.

errorServerUnreachable.message: ‏تعذّر الوصول إلى Capsule على $URL$. تأكد من تشغيل التطبيق.
errorServerUnreachable.description: Error body when the popup can't reach the paired Capsule server.

errorCasesLoadFailed.description: Error body when the case list couldn't be fetched.

errorNoActiveTab.description: Error shown when the popup can't find an active tab to capture.

errorNoCaseSelected.description: Error shown when the user tries to submit without choosing a case.

errorNoUrlsProvided.description: Error shown when the multi-URL textarea is empty on submit.

errorSyncFailed.description: Error body when the sync-cookies endpoint returned a failure.

errorRotateTokenFailed.description: Error body when the rotate-token endpoint returned a failure.

errorSubmissionFailed.description: Generic error body when capture submission failed for an unknown reason.

resultCookiesSyncedTitle.description: Title on the result screen after a successful cookies sync.

resultTokenRotatedTitle.description: Title on the result screen after a successful token rotation.

resultNewTokenIdLabel.description: Result row showing the freshly-minted token's id.

warningCookiesSkipped.description: Warning row shown in the result screen when cookies couldn't be attached for a URL.

sentCount_zero.description: Result-screen title after a successful submit. ICU plural form 'zero'.

sentCount_one.description: Result-screen title after a successful single-capture submit. ICU plural form 'one'.

sentCount_two.description: Result-screen title after a successful submit. ICU plural form 'two'.

sentCount_few.description: Result-screen title after a successful submit. ICU plural form 'few' (3–10).

sentCount_many.description: Result-screen title after a successful submit. ICU plural form 'many' (11+).

sentCount_other.description: Result-screen title after a successful multi-capture submit. ICU plural form 'other' / fallback.

pairPageTitle.description: Browser-tab title for the pairing page.

pairHeadingTitle.description: H1 heading on the pairing page.

pairStep1.description: Pairing step 1. Contains inline <code> markup; rendered as innerHTML.

pairStep2.message: انتقل إلى الإعدادات ← إضافة المتصفح وانقر على إقران إضافة جديدة.
pairStep2.description: Pairing step 2. Contains inline <strong> markup; rendered as innerHTML.

pairStep3.message: ‏انسخ الرمز المميز الذي يعرضه Capsule (يُكشف مرة واحدة فقط).
pairStep3.description: Pairing step 3. Contains inline <strong> markup; rendered as innerHTML.

pairTokenPlaceholder.description: Placeholder hint for the token input. Tokens start with the literal prefix 'capsule-' followed by base32 characters.

pairLabelInputPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text inside the device-label input.

pairSubmitButton.description: Submit button on the pairing form.

pairPrivacyNotice.message: ‏بمجرد الإقران، تتواصل الإضافة حصرًا مع رابط خادم Capsule أعلاه. لا ترسل أي بيانات إلى الإنترنت العام. يُخزَّن الرمز المميز في مخزن إضافات متصفحك ولا يُشارَك أبدًا مع صفحات الويب.
pairPrivacyNotice.description: Privacy notice at the bottom of the pairing page. Contains inline <em> markup; rendered as innerHTML.

pairUnpairButton.description: Link button that wipes the locally-stored pairing token.

pairDefaultDeviceLabel.description: Default device label submitted when the user leaves the label input blank.

pairAlreadyPairedMessage.message: ‏مقترن مع $URL$ (بصمة الخادم: $FINGERPRINT$). يُخزَّن الرمز المميز محليًا — غيّره بإعادة الإقران أو ألغِ الإقران أدناه.
pairAlreadyPairedMessage.description: Message shown when the pairing page loads with an existing token.

pairSuccessMessage.message: ‏تم الإقران. بصمة الخادم: $FINGERPRINT$. يمكنك إغلاق هذا التبويب وفتح النافذة المنبثقة.
pairSuccessMessage.description: Success message after a fresh pairing.

pairUnpairedMessage.message: تم إلغاء الإقران. تمت إزالة الرمز المميز المحلي من المتصفح.
pairUnpairedMessage.description: Message shown after the user clicks 'Unpair this extension'.

errorPairMissingServerOrToken.message: رابط الخادم والرمز المميز كلاهما مطلوبان.
errorPairMissingServerOrToken.description: Error shown when the user clicks Pair without filling both fields.

errorPairFailed.description: Generic error when the pair request failed and no specific reason was returned.
